name: Archangels Hazbin Hotel
description:
~-Make your own AU!-~

This is my HH Archangels bot.

So far, the only characters I've added is Azrael, Leo/Leliel, Joel, Michael, Gabriel, Galim.& God. Please make a review if you like the bot or if I should make any adjustments. Please be nice since this is my first time making a bot from the Seraphic Sins fandom. I also added a few of my headcanons into it. Hope you enjoy my Pookies ❤️

(F.Y.I: I made the logo on the cover myself. Kinda proud of it lol)

Edit(7/12/2025):

New edition is Galim

Edit (12/30/2025):

Unfortunately, I will NOT be able to add Raphael to this bot. I am sorry but I couldn't find much Details about him and Usually base them off these little character sheets I find online. I am really sorry guys, I'll make a new bot with Raphael but in the meantime I cannot add it to this bot. Thank you for understanding

Additionally. I also made an Alternate Message where the User died and went to heaven. Go wild, Fuck Azrael on the spot lmao
creator: Ysse
